headline: Is Eversource Energy (ES) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: For investors considering whether Eversource Energy at around US$68.51 is attractively priced or already reflects its quality, this article examines what the current share price might be implying about value. The stock is roughly flat year to date, up 0.7%, with a 1-year return of 9.8%. However, investors have seen the price decline 1.7% over the last week and 3.6% over the last month. Recent headlines around Eversource Energy have focused less on short-term trading and more on its position...
